_meta.purpose: Grounded Wolfhouse/Somo guest FAQ facts for Luna dry-run replies
_meta.source_notes: Operator-provided facts (Stage 41a). No live surf API, no website scrape, no vector search.

escalation_default: The team will confirm the exact details with you.

categories.label: Location / Somo
facts: Wolfhouse is in Somo.
General location/map link can be shared before booking.

templates.en: We're in Somo 🌊 Here's the location: {{maps_link}}

categories.label: Towels and linen
facts: Sheets are provided.
Towels are not provided — bring one for shower and beach.

templates.en: Tiny packing note 😊 We provide sheets, but not towels — so bring one for the shower and one for the beach if you can.

categories.label: What to bring
keywords: what do i need to pack
facts: Towel for beach and shower; sheets provided.
Sweatshirt/hoodie for evenings; sunscreen; swimsuit; trainers.
Poncho useful; personal hairdryer if needed — limited shared hairdryers.

templates.en: Practical packing for Somo 🌊 Sheets are on us — bring towels for shower + beach, a sweatshirt for evenings, sunscreen, swimsuit, trainers, and a poncho helps. Hairdryers are limited, so bring your own if you rely on one.

categories.label: Wetsuit guidance
facts: Wolfhouse can provide wetsuits for lessons; personal wetsuits welcome.
Common thickness around here: 4/3 or 3/2 depending on season/weather.

templates.en: For lessons we can sort you with a wetsuit 🌊 If you have your own, bring it too. Around here 4/3 or 3/2 is usually the safe call depending on the season.

categories.label: Surf lesson rhythm
facts: Lessons run most days in season; low season can be quieter.
First group leaves Wolfhouse around 08:30 for 09:00–11:00.
Second group leaves around 10:30 for 11:00–13:00.
Exact group assignment confirmed later by staff/surf school.

templates.en: Most mornings we run two surf lesson groups: one leaves Wolfhouse around 08:30 for 09:00–11:00, and the second leaves around 10:30 for 11:00–13:00. The exact group gets confirmed closer to the day.

categories.label: Board / wetsuit rentals
facts: Boards and wetsuits can be rented; pricing handled in booking flow.
Do not invent availability.

templates.en: Yep — we can help with board and wetsuit rentals 🌊 Exact options depend on your dates and stay. If you're booking now, tell me your dates and I can keep going with the stay quote.

categories.label: Payments overview
facts: Deposit or full payment holds the booking.
Remaining balance can be paid on arrival by cash, bank transfer, or Stripe.
Add-on services can be added and settled at checkout unless paid earlier.

templates.en: To hold a booking you can pay a deposit or the full amount upfront. The rest can be settled on arrival — cash, bank transfer, or Stripe all work. Add-ons like rentals or lessons can go on your booking and be paid at checkout unless you settle them earlier.

categories.label: Airport transfer process
facts: Airport transfers can be organized; staff confirm exact pickup.
Guest can share airport, flight number, arrival date/time, passengers, luggage/boards.
Do not promise a driver until staff/system confirms.

templates.en: We can help organize airport transfers 😊 Send your airport, flight number, arrival date/time, passenger count, and any luggage or boards — the team confirms the exact pickup. I can't promise a driver until that's confirmed.

categories.label: Yoga and meals
facts: Yoga and meals can be requested/added; staff schedule exact timing.
Guest can settle at checkout.
Do not invent dates/times.

templates.en: Yoga and dinners can be added to your stay 😊 Exact times get scheduled/confirmed by the team — I won't guess a slot. They can usually be settled at checkout with the rest of your balance.

categories.label: Board care
keywords: what do i do with the board
where do i put the board
facts: Rinse Wolfhouse boards after the beach.
Return boards to the board storage area.

templates.en: After surfing, give Wolfhouse boards a quick rinse and pop them back in the board storage area 🌊 Thanks for looking after the gear!

categories.label: House basics / rules
facts: Food boxes/fridge labels: write name + checkout date.
Sheets provided; towels not provided.

templates.en: Quick house note 😊 Label food in the fridge/boxes with your name + checkout date. Sheets are provided; towels aren't — bring your own for shower and beach.

categories.label: Check-in / check-out
facts: Check-in/check-out times are in client baseline; answer generally if unsure.

templates.en: Check-in is usually from the afternoon and check-out in the morning — the team sends exact times with your confirmed booking details.

categories.label: Gate code (private)
facts: Gate code only after confirmed booking / confirmation path.
Never expose bed number.

templates.en: The gate code comes with your confirmed booking/check-in info once the stay is locked in 🔒 I can't share it before that — after you book, it'll be in your confirmation message.
templates.en_confirmed: Your gate code is in your confirmation details 🔒 If anything looks off, ping the team and they'll help.
